text: Trump: Now that the Hormuz Strait situation is over, I received a call from NATO asking if we would need some help. I TOLD THEM TO STAY AWAY, UNLESS THEY JUST WANT TO LOAD UP THEIR SHIPS WITH OIL. They were useless when needed, a Paper Tiger!

text: OSINTdefender According to Axios, citing two U.S. officials, a three-page plan is at the center of U.S.-Iranian peace talks. One facet of the plan reportedly being discussed by both sides is the release of $20 billion in frozen Iranian funds in exchange for Iran giving up its stockpiles of enriched uranium. Per the report, earlier in the negotiation process, the U.S. offered the release of $6 billion and the Iranians countered with a demand to release $27 billion. U.S. officials have described the potential deal as a “cash-for-uranium concept.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据Axios援引两名美国官员的话称，一份三页的计划是美伊和平谈判的核心。据报道，双方正在讨论的计划的一个方面是释放200亿美元的伊朗冻结资金，以换取伊朗放弃其浓缩铀库存。据报道，在谈判过程的早期，美国提出释放60亿美元，而伊朗则反要求释放270亿美元。美国官员将这一潜在协议描述为“以现金换铀的概念”。推文

text: A small fire broke out on the USS Dwight D. Eisenhower (CVN-69) during maintenance at a Virginia shipyard. Three sailors had minor injuries and returned to duty. The fire was quickly contained, and the cause is under investigation. Source: Fox News
text_zh: 在弗吉尼亚州的一个造船厂进行维护期间，美国“德怀特·D·艾森豪威尔”号航空母舰（CVN-69）发生了一场小火灾。三名水手受轻伤并已重返岗位。火势很快得到控制，起火原因正在调查中。来源：福克斯新闻

There are things we plan to do against the threat of the remaining rockets and against…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu called for patience in the fight against Hezbollah, stressing it won't be over tomorrow: ​"This will not be achieved tomorrow. It requires a continuous effort; it requires patience, it requires strategic endurance, and it requires intelligent navigation in the diplomatic arena." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡承认，打击真主党的斗争尚未结束：“但我诚实地说：我们还没有完成工作。我们计划针对剩余火箭弹的威胁采取一些行动，并针对……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡呼吁在打击真主党的斗争中保持耐心，强调明天不会结束：“这不会在明天实现。它需要持续的努力；它需要耐心，它需要战略耐力，它需要在外交舞台上进行明智的导航。” @wfwitness

text: Senior Iranian military official on the opening of Strait of Hormuz: Only non-military vessels can transit, through designated routes and with IRGC Navy approval. Civilian ships must follow routes set by Iran’s Ports and Maritime Organization. Source: IRIB
text_zh: 伊朗高级军事官员谈霍尔木兹海峡的开放：只有非军事船只可以通过指定航线并在获得伊斯兰革命卫队海军批准的情况下通行。民用船只必须遵守伊朗港口和海事组织设定的航线。来源：伊朗伊斯兰共和国广播电视台（IRIB）

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that Israel has destroyed 90% of Hezbollah’s missile and rocket stockpile and that it's a shadow of what it once was: ​"Regarding the distant threat, we destroyed close to 90% of the missile and rocket…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu admitted that the fight against Hezbollah is not over: "But I say in all honesty: we have not finished the job yet. There are things we plan to do against the threat of the remaining rockets and against the drones threat—I will not elaborate—but we also have another goal, and that is the dismantling of Hezbollah." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，以色列已经摧毁了真主党90%的导弹和火箭弹库存，它已不复当年：“关于远距离威胁，我们摧毁了纳斯鲁拉建立的近90%的导弹和火箭弹……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡承认，打击真主党的斗争尚未结束：“但我诚实地说：我们还没有完成工作。我们计划针对剩余火箭弹的威胁和无人机威胁采取一些行动——我不会详细说明——但我们还有另一个目标，那就是瓦解真主党。” @wfwitness

text: Netanyahu on Lebanon: We achieved great accomplishments. We created for the first time a long security zone along the entire northern border. This strip completely removes the close threat of invasion. We destroyed nearly 90% of the missile and rocket stockpiles.” Hezbollah today is a shadow of itself. We haven’t finished the job yet. This will not be achieved tomorrow. It requires patience and continuous effort. We agreed to a temporary ceasefire in Lebanon. For the first time in 43 years, Israel and Lebanon are talking directly. We will give an opportunity for a diplomatic and military solution. The road to peace is still long, but we have begun it. Our one hand holds the weapon, our other hand is extended for peace.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡谈黎巴嫩：我们取得了巨大的成就。我们首次在整个北部边界沿线建立了一个长期的安全区。这一地带彻底消除了近距离的入侵威胁。我们摧毁了近90%的导弹和火箭弹库存。今天的真主党已不复当年。我们还没有完成工作。这不会在明天实现。它需要耐心和持续的努力。我们同意在黎巴嫩实行临时停火。43年来，以色列和黎巴嫩首次直接对话。我们将提供一个外交和军事解决方案的机会。通往和平的道路依然漫长，但我们已经开始了。我们一手持武器，另一手伸向和平。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that the IDF’s security zone in Lebanon removes the threat of an invasion by Hezbollah: ​"This zone completely removes the imminent threat of invasion and anti-tank fire, and the IDF is stationed there…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that Israel has destroyed 90% of Hezbollah’s missile and rocket stockpile and that it's a shadow of what it once was: ​"Regarding the distant threat, we destroyed close to 90% of the missile and rocket stockpiles that Nasrallah built. We eliminated Nasrallah himself, we neutralized them with the pagers, and we eliminated thousands of terrorists. Today's Hezbollah is a shadow of its former self compared to Nasrallah's peak years." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，以色列国防军在黎巴嫩的安全区消除了真主党入侵的威胁：“该区域彻底消除了入侵和反坦克火力的迫在眉睫的威胁，以色列国防军驻扎在那里……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，以色列已经摧毁了真主党90%的导弹和火箭弹库存，它已不复当年：“关于远距离威胁，我们摧毁了纳斯鲁拉建立的近90%的导弹和火箭弹库存。我们消灭了纳斯鲁拉本人，我们用寻呼机消灭了他们，我们消灭了数千名恐怖分子。与纳斯鲁拉的全盛时期相比，今天的真主党已不复当年。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that Israel has created a far stretching security zone in Lebanon: ​"For the first time, we have created a long security zone along the entire northern border—not just in Lebanon, not just here. At…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that the IDF’s security zone in Lebanon removes the threat of an invasion by Hezbollah: ​"This zone completely removes the imminent threat of invasion and anti-tank fire, and the IDF is stationed there on the yellow line to continue defending against the imminent threat." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，以色列已在黎巴嫩建立了一个延伸很远的缓冲区：‘我们首次沿着整个北部边界建立了一个长长的缓冲区——不仅仅是在黎巴嫩，也不仅仅是在这里。在……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，以色列国防军在黎巴嫩的缓冲区消除了真主党入侵的威胁：“该区域彻底消除了迫在眉睫的入侵和反坦克火力威胁，以色列国防军驻扎在黄线上，以继续防御迫在眉睫的威胁。” @wfwitness

text: Iranian military official says military vessels not allowed to pass Strait of Hormuz. Source: State TV
text_zh: 伊朗军事官员称军事船只不得通过霍尔木兹海峡。来源：国家电视台

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin addressed Israeli stating that they have eliminated the Hezbollah threat: "We had two threats from Lebanon: an imminent threat and a distant threat. The imminent threat was the infiltration of thousands of terrorists…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that Israel has created a far stretching security zone in Lebanon: ​"For the first time, we have created a long security zone along the entire northern border—not just in Lebanon, not just here. At Rosh Hanikra, you see, this is the northern border; not just here, but along the entire Lebanese border to Mount Hermon, through the Golan Heights and down to the Yarmouk. They wanted to surround us with a ring of fire; we created a ring of security." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明向以色列人发表讲话，称他们已经消除了真主党的威胁：‘我们面临来自黎巴嫩的两个威胁：迫在眉睫的威胁和遥远的威胁。迫在眉睫的威胁是数千名恐怖分子的渗透……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，以色列已在黎巴嫩建立了一个延伸很远的缓冲区：“我们首次沿着整个北部边界建立了一个长长的缓冲区——不仅仅是在黎巴嫩，也不仅仅是在这里。在罗什哈尼克拉（Rosh Hanikra），你看，这是北部边界；不仅仅是在这里，而是沿着整个黎巴嫩边界一直到黑门山，穿过戈兰高地，向下延伸到雅尔穆克河。他们想用火圈包围我们；我们创造了一个安全圈。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin addressed Israeli stating that they have eliminated the Hezbollah threat: "We had two threats from Lebanon: an imminent threat and a distant threat. The imminent threat was the infiltration of thousands of terrorists into our territory and direct anti-tank fire at our communities. The distant threat, which Nasrallah built up over decades, was the firing of 150,000 missiles and rockets intended to destroy the cities of Israel. We have removed both of these threats." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明向以色列人发表讲话，称他们已经消除了真主党的威胁：“我们面临来自黎巴嫩的两个威胁：迫在眉睫的威胁和遥远的威胁。迫在眉睫的威胁是数千名恐怖分子渗透到我们的领土，并直接向我们的社区发射反坦克火力。遥远的威胁，即纳斯鲁拉几十年来建立的威胁，是发射15万枚旨在摧毁以色列城市的导弹和火箭弹。我们已经消除了这两个威胁。” @wfwitness

text: OSINTtechnical Trump says that the US will continue to blockade Iran after it announced Hormuz was open. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045133063034659142/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 特朗普表示，在伊朗宣布霍尔木兹海峡开放后，美国将继续封锁伊朗。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045133063034659142/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Opening the strait after its reportedly open. British PM Starmer, German Chancellor Merz, and French President Macron are in Paris ahead of a European summit on establishing a naval defensive force to secure shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045128594020556824/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 在据报道海峡开放后，海峡正在开放。英国首相斯塔默、德国总理默茨和法国总统马克龙在欧洲峰会前夕齐聚巴黎，旨在建立一支海军防御部队，以确保霍尔木兹海峡的航运安全。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045128594020556824/photo/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel TRUMP: THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ IS COMPLETELY OPEN AND READY FOR BUSINESS AND FULL PASSAGE, BUT THE NAVAL BLOCKADE WILL REMAIN IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT AS IT PERTAINS TO IRAN, ONLY, UNTIL SUCH TIME AS OUR TRANSACTION WITH IRAN IS 100% COMPLETE. THIS PROCESS SHOULD GO VERY QUICKLY IN THAT MOST OF THE POINTS ARE ALREADY NEGOTIATED. THANK YOU FOR YOUR ATTENTION TO THIS M tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：霍尔木兹海峡已完全开放，随时可以进行商业活动和全面通行，但针对伊朗的海军封锁将继续全面有效，直到我们与伊朗的交易100%完成为止。这个过程应该会很快，因为大部分条款已经谈妥。感谢您的关注。推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 Reuters: U.S. official: Military blockade on Iran remains fully in place. Trump: IRAN HAS JUST ANNOUNCED THAT THE STRAIT OF IRAN IS FULLY OPEN AND READY FOR FULL PASSAGE. THANK YOU! https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045130995473568122/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最新消息 🔴 路透社：美国官员：对伊朗的军事封锁仍然完全有效。特朗普：伊朗刚刚宣布伊朗海峡已完全开放，随时可以全面通行。谢谢！https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045130995473568122/photo/1 - Open Source Intel 推文
